category_sources: source_facts.description says PNG to icon converter; FreshPorts port details describe converting PNG files to Windows icon resource files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is png2ico; FreshPorts port name is png2ico.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to FreshPorts; FreshPorts lists the upstream WWW, distfile, and png2ico(1) manual page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official sources found point to an upstream source archive and port metadata, not an official source-control repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and source_facts.executables identify a PNG-to-ICO command-line converter.
